text:
wen         2009-12-24 03:27:50 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    chinese              Makefile 
  Added files:
    chinese/scim-array   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  scim-array is an SCIM IMEngine module for array 30. It supports
  array 6.0 Unicode CJK Extension B and special input code.
  
  WWW: http://scimarray.openfoundry.org/
  
  PR:             ports/141927
  Submitted by:   Li-Lun Wang (Leland Wang) <llwang@infor.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.279     +1 -0      ports/chinese/Makefile
  1.1       +34 -0     ports/chinese/scim-array/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/chinese/scim-array/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/chinese/scim-array/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +13 -0     ports/chinese/scim-array/pkg-plist (new)
